opportunities.specific_product: under-sink pull-out storage organizer / over-toilet space saver
opportunities.transformation_hook: $28 fix turned our chaotic under-sink cabinet into a spa-organized bathroom
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered under-sink cabinet — tangled cords, toppling bottles, nothing visible or reachable
opportunities.after_state: Pull-out drawers and labeled bins, everything visible, spa-clean bathroom cabinet
opportunities.why_now: Two independent Pinterest publishers (HGTV bath spaces, RealSimple's 'designer-approved bathroom storage picks starting at $14') are pushing bathroom storage content simultaneously, signaling a surfacing aesthetic trend.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $52 stretch cover erased 3 years of dog stains from our couch in 10 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch cushions with visible wear and odor
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, tailored-looking couch instantly refreshed with a pet-hair-resistant surface
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's Pinterest content on dogs in beautiful homes ('pawfect photos') signals pet-friendly home styling is trending, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the highest-margin transformation angle to run right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm cooling side-sleeper pillow / cooling sheet set
opportunities.transformation_hook: $39 cooling pillow ended our sweaty, neck-pain summer nights
opportunities.before_state: Hot, sweat-soaked bed, tossing and turning all night, stiff neck from an unsupportive pillow
opportunities.after_state: Crisp cool bedding setup with proper neck support and restful, sweat-free sleep
opportunities.why_now: RealSimple's Pinterest feed is actively pushing 'cooling products for summer... save up to 60%' this week, and it's mid-July peak heat — direct, urgent buyer intent right now.

opportunities.specific_product: brass or matte-black cabinet pulls & knobs hardware kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: $22 hardware swap made our dated kitchen cabinets look brand new
opportunities.before_state: Builder-grade or worn oil-rubbed-bronze pulls on tired, dated-looking cabinets
opportunities.after_state: Modern brushed-gold or matte-black pulls that transform the whole kitchen instantly
opportunities.why_now: BHG ('outdated design trends worth ditching, and what to buy instead'), RealSimple ('kitchen design mistakes that instantly date your home'), and AptTherapy's DIY cabinet renovation post are three publishers converging on the same kitchen-refresh angle this week.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $34 blackout curtains turned our sun-baked bedroom into a cool dark cave
opportunities.before_state: Sun-flooded bedroom with harsh morning light, room heats up like a greenhouse
opportunities.after_state: Moody, cool, hotel-dark bedroom that blocks both heat and light
opportunities.why_now: AptTherapy just pinned sage green velvet blackout curtains specifically for blocking 'harsh sunlight' — landing exactly as mid-July heat makes sun-blocking bedroom content highly shareable.
